content.en:
"Lord Longgu, do you know this Purple Aurora Beast?"

The Frostless Lord was surprised.

"Yes!" Lord Longgu nodded.

Immediately, the Dragon Ancient Lord introduced: "This Purple Aurora Beast is very famous, but it is an incomparably ancient Legendary Realm Lord, it is too far away from now, I am afraid that only some ancient Legendary Realm Lords know him." He, called the Purple Pole Lord, was the second Purple Aurora Beast in the Void Region. His strength is very strong, much stronger than me, I used to be just a junior in front of him, and I need to look up to him. He controls time and space, and is at the pinnacle of the Legendary Realm Lord. It can be said that as long as the Eternal Master does not kill him, he will hardly die. ~"

"Then this is ......"

The Frostless Lord looked at the corpse of the Purple Pole Lord suspiciously, a little puzzled.

Could it be that the Purple Pole Lord was killed by the Eternal Master, but why did the Eternal Ruler kill the Purple Pole Lord?

But then, she knew she had guessed wrong.

"No, no Eternal Controller will kill him" The Dragon Gu Lord shook his head and said: "He didn't die at the hands of others, but died in the process of impacting the Eternal Master, and it is very dangerous to impact the Eternal Master, even if there are many doppelgangers. Therefore, those legendary realm lords at the peak all attribute the power of the clone to the main body to attack the eternal master, if they live, they are the eternal master, and if they fail, they will fall completely. The Purple Pole Lord has not appeared for an incomparably long time, and many Legendary Realm Lords believe that he has fallen from the Impact of the Eternal Master, and there are also Legendary Realm Lords who believe that he has become the Eternal Master. But many legends are very clear, if he really becomes the eternal master, the fate of the Purple Aurora Beast will not be so miserable. Therefore, I also tend that he has fallen, and now that I see his body, I can be sure. "

"Will the Shock Eternal Master fall?"

Ye Tiandu was surprised.

The other half-step Legendary Realm Lords were also a little shocked, this was indeed a secret that none of them knew.

"It is precisely because the impact on the Eternal Controller is so dangerous, unless there is a certain certainty, those Legendary Realm Lords at the peak will not try, and there are currently many peak Legendary Realm Lords who have given up the impact, and it is not bad to be alive like this, at least if you don't offend the Eternal Master, many Eternal Seas in the Void Region are invincible existences, and it is difficult to be killed. "Lord Longgu said.

The other half-step Legendary Realm Lords nodded in agreement.

If you're not sure, there's no need to impact the Eternal Master, and it's also good to be an invincible existence in the Legendary Realm

There are not many Legendary Realm Lords who are truly as eager for the Eternal Controller as the Purple Pole Lord, and if they are not sure, even take the risk of trying to break through.

Suddenly.

Lord Longgu said: "This is the place where the Purple Pole Lord will attack the Eternal Master, so this Time Constant Gold Vein is actually condensed by the Purple Pole Lord's own strength, so I can't move here anymore, this Time Constant Gold Vein will stay here." In fact, this is a natural treasure land, a land of great opportunity, although the Purple Pole Lord failed to break through, he has created a treasure land of time and space, which is conducive to your comprehension of time and space. But once you enter the depths of this treasure land, it will not last forever, the balance of time and space will be broken, and it will slowly collapse, so that before it collapses, you can hope to control time or space. If we're lucky, we might be able to give birth to a new Legendary Lord. "

"It's a place that helps us control time and space?"

The Frostless Lord was extremely shocked, and immediately became excited.

"In order to prevent the leakage of this treasure land and the leakage of this time constant gold, you must not reveal the situation here, not even the other half-step Legendary Realm lords of the True Saintless Land, don't mention it to them. When this treasure land collapses, you will return to the True Void Holy Land with Time Hengjin, and I will help you build the Bridge of Time, and then let other half-step Legendary Realms enter it to cultivate, and give them more time to cultivate, which can be regarded as making up for them" The Dragon Gu Lord proposed.

The Frostless Lord and other half-step Legendary Realm Lords also understood the importance of secrecy, after all, such a treasure land was too precious.

No one knows if the other half-step Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Holy Land will be revealed?

Besides, such a treasure land can't accommodate too many people, and if there are too many people, this place will collapse quickly.

"Endless Lord, you must also keep it a secret!

Lord Longgu looked at Ye Tian.

"I'll keep it a secret!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"I need to secure this place before I send you to the treasure land!"

Lord Longgu said.

Time passed slowly, and the Dragon Gu Lord gradually stabilized the energy here, at least everyone would not be killed by the energy here.

The so-called energy impact is that the power of time and space is out of balance, resulting in an explosion of energy, and why is it out of balance, it is naturally Ye Tian who broke into here.

Otherwise, the balance will not be lost.

But whoever comes here will lose balance here, and this is inevitable.

.... 0

"Alright, the energy is solid, I'll send you in!"

With a wave of his hand, Lord Longgu wrapped everyone in a force that tore through time and space, and entered a space-time treasure land.

In the center of this space-time treasure land, the corpse of the Purple Pole Lord was still there.

And this treasure of time and space is divided into two parts, one part can be used to understand space, and the other part can be used to understand time

Most of the half-step Legendary Realms came to the area of the Enlightenment Time, and only two half-step Legendary Realms came to the area of the Enlightenment Space.

And the Dragon Ancient Lord is also here to contemplate the experience.After all, the experience of the Purple Pole Lord's failure to comprehend is also the experience.In case he wants to attack the Eternal Controller in the future, the perception here will be useful to him.

Moreover, the Dragon Gu Lord only controls time, and has not yet controlled space, so he also wants to comprehend space here.

However, it is very difficult to control the space after controlling the time.

Otherwise, it would be impossible for many Legendary Realm Lords to control only time or space, and it would be difficult to control space and time at the same time.

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, thinking about the time to contemplate or the space to contemplate?

"Enlightenment time, I have copied so many time talents, if it is fused, it will definitely be able to form a legendary-level time ancestor, in that case, I have a huge advantage in the comprehension time. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he came to the area of the time of enlightenment.

At the same time, he began to fuse those time talents that he had copied from the nine. _
